mapper.select: SELECT RATE_CD ,APPL_END_DT ,APPL_STRT_DT ,RATE_NM ,RATE_GRP_CD ,PAY_CL_CD ,RATE_TYPE ,DATA_TYPE ,BASE_AMT ,FREE_CALL_CL_CD ,FREE_CALL_CNT ,NW_IN_CALL_CNT ,NW_OUT_CALL_CNT ,FREE_SMS_CNT ,FREE_DATA_CNT ,RMK ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,ONLINE_TYPE_CD ,AL_FLAG ,SERVICE_TYPE ,CMNT ,STTC_YN ,ONLINE_CAN_YN ,CAN_CMNT ,ONLINE_CAN_DAY FROM MSP_RATE_MST@dl_msp WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd}

SELECT TEMPLATE_ID ,TEMPLATE_NM ,TEMPLATE_DSC ,MGMT_ORGN_ID ,MSG_TYPE ,CALLBACK ,TEXT ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ,RVISN_ID ,RVISN_DTTM ,EXPIRE_HOUR ,SUBJECT ,WORK_TYPE ,RETRY ,K_TEMPLATE_CODE FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST@dl_msp WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}

SELECT 'phone' SEARCH_TYPE , A.PROD_ID --상품아이디 , A.PROD_CTG_ID --상품분류아이디 (lte,3g) , CASE WHEN A.PROD_CTG_ID = '03' THEN '3G' WHEN A.PROD_CTG_ID = '04' THEN 'LTE' WHEN A.PROD_CTG_ID = '08' THEN '5G' ELSE 'LTE' END AS PROD_CTG_NAME --상품(색인) , A.PROD_NM --상품명(색인) , A.MAKR_CD --제조사코드 , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID --대표모델ID , A.SHOW_YN --노출여부 , A.SALE_YN --판매여부 , A.OFW_DATE --출고일자 , A.LIST_SHOW_TEXT --목록노출텍스트(색인) , A.LIST_SHOW_OPTN --목록노출옵션(색인) , A.APD_DESC_1 --추가설명1(색인) , A.APD_DESC_2 --추가설명2(색인) , A.APD_DESC_3 --추가설명3(색인) , A.STCK_TYPE_TOP --스티커노출(상) , A.STCK_TYPE_TAIL --스티커노출(하) , A.SNTY_PROD_DESC --단말기상품설명(색인) , A.SNTY_NET --단말기네트워크(색인) , A.SNTY_DISP --단말기디스플레이(색인) , A.SNTY_SIZE --단말기크기(색인) , A.SNTY_WEIGHT --단말기무게(색인) , A.SNTY_MEMR --단말기메모리(색인) , A.SNTY_BTRY --단말기배터리(색인) , A.SNTY_OS --단말기OS(색인) , A.SNTY_WAIT_TIME --단말기대기시간(색인) , A.SNTY_CAM --단말기카메라(색인) , A.SNTY_VIDE_TLK --단말기영상통화(색인) , A.SNTY_PROD_NM --단말기명(색인) , A.SNTY_REL_MONTH --출시월(색인) , A.SNTY_COLOR --단말기색상(색인) , A.SNTY_MAKER --단말기제조사/브랜드명(색인) , A.SNTY_MODEL_ID --단말기모델번호(색인) , B.MNFCT_NM --제조사명(색인) , B.ZIPCD , B.ADDR --(색인) , B.DTL_ADDR --(색인) , B.TELNUM --(색인) , B.EMAIL --(색인) , A.MAKR_NM --제조사명 중고폰에서만사용 , A.SHAND_YN -- 중고폰여부 , A.INVENTORY_AMT --중고폰 재고수량 , A.SALE_PRICE --중고폰 판매가격 , A.PROD_GRADE --종고폰 등급(색인) , A.SHAND_TYPE --중고폰분류값(중고폰,외산폰) , CASE WHEN A.SHAND_TYPE = '01' THEN '중고폰' WHEN A.SHAND_TYPE = '02' THEN '외산폰' ELSE '중고폰' END AS SHAND_TYPE_NAME --중고폰분류(색인) , A.RECOMMEND_RATE --추천요금제 , A.USED_WARRANTY --중고폰 워런티(색인) , CASE WHEN A.USED_WARRANTY = '01' THEN '중고폰' WHEN A.USED_WARRANTY = '02' THEN '외산폰' ELSE '신폰' END AS USED_WARRANTY_NAME --중고폰 워런티(색인) , IMG.SNTY_COLOR_CD --색상코드 , IMG.IMG_TYPE_CD --이미지유형구분(앞,뒤..) , IMG.IMG_PATH --이미지경로 , SNTY.HNDSET_MODEL_ID --단말기모델ID , SNTY.HNDSET_MODEL_NM --단말기모델명(색인) , A.SHOW_ODRG FROM NMCP_PROD_BAS A LEFT OUTER JOIN ORG_MNFCT_MST@DL_MSP B ON A.MAKR_CD = B.MNFCT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS SNTY ON A.PROD_ID = SNTY.PROD_ID AND SNTY.RPRS_PRDT_YN = 'Y' -- 대표 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT PROD_ID, SNTY_COLOR_CD, IMG_TYPE_CD, IMG_PATH FROM ( SELECT PROD_ID, SNTY_COLOR_CD, IMG_TYPE_CD, IMG_PATH, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY PROD_ID ORDER BY IMG_TYPE_CD) RNK FROM NMCP_PROD_IMG_DTL ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) IMG ON A.PROD_ID = IMG.PROD_ID AND SNTY.PROD_ID = IMG.PROD_ID AND SNTY.ATRIB_VAL_CD_1 = IMG.SNTY_COLOR_CD AND SNTY.HNDSET_MODEL_ID IS NOT NULL WHERE A.SHOW_YN ='Y' AND A.SALE_YN ='Y' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY A.SHOW_ODRG
